title: Farmers & Fortunes
description: In Farmers and Fortunes, you have the decision what you want to become, Explore, Farm, and Fight.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bbab6adf0567962d3de2398103c78ff24216598.png)


✔️ Completely Overhauled World Generation (tectonic)

✔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support

✔️ Overhauled Animations

✔️ New & Overhauled Dungeons and Structures 

✔️ New Bosses and Mobs (Bosses of Mass Destruction, Knightful)

✔️ Skill Level System (Levelz & JobsAddon)

✔️ Fitting Map (Antique Atlas)

✔️ Lots of Decoration and Furniture (Convenient Decor, Another Furniture, Furnection, Furnish, etc.)

✔️ get Drunk (Let's do: Vinery, Bakery, Beachparty, BloomingNature, Brewery, Farm&Charm, Candlelight, Furniture, Meadow, HerbalBrews, WilderNature)

✔️ Many Custom Features for an Improved Experience

✔️ Quest Blackboard

✔️ 230+ Mods


## FARMING
It's a base of Farmer's Delight with a few companion mods.
The whole Let's Do Series, including crops and farming tools.
Tools for agricultural pursuits, carts, planters and so on.

## ENVOIRNMENT
You can generate terrain using Tectonic and Geophilic.
Modded biomes through Nature's Spirit and various Let's Do mods.
Immersive Weathering allows the player to interact with the world around them.

## BUILDING AND DECOR
A big block pallete, and loads of variations thanks to Chipped.
There are loads of furniture mods too.
and we have ribbits

## INDUSTRIALIZATION
Create, paired alongside multiple add-ons for taking your farm to the industrial level.


### Roadmap Ideas:
- Add Quest system
- add a better fog
- add some more bosses
- a better look for this page
- open for more


### Resource Pack tips:
- look [here](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki) for animated eyes
- make sure to decide between "Fresh Moves" and "Detailed Animations"
- "Better Cats", "better Dogs", and "Assorted Alleys" must be above "Fresh Animations"
